items.description: Baseball Cap with curved brim, adjustable strap; designed for 日常穿搭, 戶外活動. Safe, tasteful, versatile. ｜ 棒球帽，特色：curved brim、adjustable strap；適用於日常穿搭、戶外活動。風格安全、實穿多變。
